title: Section 88
content: Any person deeming himself aggrieved by an order under 3*** section 87 may appeal to the High Court, and the provisions of the 1[Code of Criminal Procedure, 18982 (5 of 1898)], relating to appeal shall, so far as may be, apply to appeals under this section.
footnote: 1. The words and figures "section 83 or" omitted by Act 10 of 1914, s. 3 and the Second Schedule. 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 1914, s. 2 and the First Schedule 3. Now see Act 2 of 1974.
